basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 508 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Ghaziabad District
basic_details.organization_name: Office of District Programme Officer (Child Development), Ghaziabad
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Programme Officer (Child Development), Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, has invited online applications for direct recruitment to vacant, honorarium-based posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) and Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) at Anganwadi centres across urban and rural areas of the district. This recruitment is being carried out under Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025. There are 508 vacancies in total across five Child Development Project blocks — Bhojpur, Ghaziabad City, Loni, Muradnagar, and Rajapur. Only online applicat

qualification.details: Minimum qualification: Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. Maximum qualification: Postgraduate or equivalent. | Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts. The applicant must be a permanent resident of the Ward (in urban areas) or Gram Sabha where the vacant post is located. If an eligible candidate belonging to the required category is not available within that Gram Sabha, permanent residency of the corresponding Nyaya Panchayat is mandatory instead. | The applicant's age, as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026, should not be less than 18 years and not more than 35 years.

how_to_apply: Read the detailed proforma and eligibility criteria available on the website carefully before applying.
Fill and submit the online application form within the prescribed timeframe, i.e., on or before 7 August 2026, till 12:00 midnight.

Only online applications submitted through the departmental website will be accepted. Offline application forms or any other documents will not be accepted or considered valid under any circumstances.
important_instructions: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts. Candidates must ensure they meet the ward/gram sabha (or Nyaya Panchayat, where applicable) domicile requirement for the specific post applied for. Applicants should study the Government Order dated 17 September 2025 thoroughly before applying, as the recruitment process will be based entirely on that order. For more information, candidates may contact the Child Development Project Office of the concerned Development Block, or the District Programme Officer (Child Development) office at Vikas Bhawan, on any working day within office hours.

rows.details: Office of District Programme Officer (Child Development), Ghaziabad

content_sections.heading: Ghaziabad Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The vacancies are distributed across five Child Development Project blocks as follows: The full gram sabha/ward-wise breakup and reservation details for the above posts, along with eligibility criteria, have been displayed on the notice boards of the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, District Programme Office (Child Development), and the respective Block Development/Child Development Project offices. The detailed particulars are also uploaded on the departmental website http://upanganwadibharti.in.

content_sections.heading: Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Minimum qualification: Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. Maximum qualification: Postgraduate or equivalent. Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts. The applicant must be a permanent resident of the Ward (in urban areas) or Gram Sabha where the vacant post is located. If an eligible candidate belonging to the required category is not available within that Gram Sabha, permanent residency of the corresponding Nyaya Panchayat is mandatory instead. The applicant's age, as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026, should not be less than 18 years and not more than 35 years.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the departmental website: http://upanganwadibharti.in . Read the detailed proforma and eligibility criteria available on the website carefully before applying. Fill and submit the online application form within the prescribed timeframe, i.e., on or before 7 August 2026, till 12:00 midnight. Only online applications submitted through the departmental website will be accepted. Offline application forms or any other documents will not be accepted or considered valid under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts. Candidates must ensure they meet the ward/gram sabha (or Nyaya Panchayat, where applicable) domicile requirement for the specific post applied for. Applicants should study the Government Order dated 17 September 2025 thoroughly before applying, as the recruitment process will be based entirely on that order. For more information, candidates may contact the Child Development Project Office of the concerned Development Block, or the District Programme Officer (Child Development) office at Vikas Bhawan, on any working day within office hours.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 508 vacancies in total -167 for Anganwadi Karyakartri and 341 for Anganwadi Sahayika, across five blocks: Bhojpur, Ghaziabad City, Loni, Muradnagar, and Rajapur.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 7 August 2026, till 12:00 midnight.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent, and the maximum qualification considered is Postgraduate or equivalent.

faq.question: Q5. Can male candidates apply for Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the advertised posts.

faq.question: Q6. Is domicile required for Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Applicants must be permanent residents of the Ward (in urban areas) or Gram Sabha of the vacant post. If no eligible candidate is available within the Gram Sabha, residency in the corresponding Nyaya Panchayat is required instead.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for Ghaziabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only, through http://upanganwadibharti.in. Offline forms or documents submitted through any other mode will not be accepted.
